text_block_list.text:
After spending time with her, there are many things I came to 
understand about Daitaku Helios, a party Uma Musume that was very 
much like the Sun. And one of those things wasвАХ

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Boom boom booooпљЮm! 
I'll blast right through this trainingпљЮпљЮпљЮ!!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Motivation's a real drag, yoпљЮвА¶вА¶ 
life's like a dude in a speedoпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮ

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wei wei weпљЮiвШЖ 
Keep the good vibes comin' FOOOOOOпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮ!!!

вА¶вА¶this is usually how training went. Her mood from moment to 
moment, greatly affected how things progressed.

But still, lately Daitaku Helios' condition has been pretty good. 
Seems like she's enjoying school life too, if that's the caseвАХвАХ

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
NuaaaaaaaпљЮ! I've just been repeatin' that hellish training menu! 
Give me back my youthful lifeпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮ!!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
And those Limited Edition Uma Pyoi Love You Love You pancakesвА¶вА¶ 
I thought they'd be my friends foreverвАХвАХ

choice_data_list: Parting is such sweet sorrow, huh?
Parting is such sweet sorrow, huh?
text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wouldn't it be a real downer if someone you knew transferred 
away suddenly!? It's the same as that! For real!

choice_data_list: Wanna go find something like it?
text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Right!? 
Not goodпљЮвА¶вА¶ haven't felt this empty in a while.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
HmmmпљЮпљЮпљЮ. But isn't that hopeless? 
It's those Awe&Some friends we're talkin' about, right?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but I'll gladly take Trai-pi's heart! 
Yes-Please-And-Thank-You, Trai-poyo-check!

She was trying to force a smile, but it caught 
my attentionвА¶вА¶ Though to be honest, I only understood 
half of why she was depressed.

But, as Daitaku Helios' trainer, 
I had to do something to cheer her upвА¶!

choice_data_list: P-party peeps should raise the roofвА¶вА¶!
text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Hmm? What's up, Trai-poyo? The ceiling?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
вА¶вА¶!! That's it, Trai-pippiвА¶вА¶ 
I got it, loud and clear!

choice_data_list: вА¶вА¶eh? No that's not what IвА¶вА¶
text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
So that's what you're aimin' for! A party animal!! 
You shoulda said that soonerпљЮпљЮпљЮ!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You don't need to hold backпљЮпљЮпљЮ! Leave it to me, okay!? 
I'll turn ya in to a proper party animal!!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Allllright, let's goпљЮ! 
We're gonna really let looseпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮвШЖ

Without giving me time to object, 
Daitaku Helios dragged me out in to the city.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
гАОHoldin' a rockin' Live, with a call 
out from the past, Come on!гАП

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
гАОWe're livin' it up! We're livin' it up!гАП 
C'mon, I can't hear yaпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮ!!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Old lady! 
One honeyпљЮ MAX, Mega Size!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Trai-pi, if you're a party peep, 
go for it! Poyo it! 'Kay?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
No wayпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮ!? Trai-pi, you're a pro! 
Grabbin' two at the same time is crazy! Bring 'em in, go-!!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
вАХHey, they fell! Ahahahaa!! 
No choice but to go for three next, huh?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Uwahahahaa! It's already evening! 
Anyways, good work todayпљЮвШЖ

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Got that rightвШЖ Soon, I'll make a party animal out of you! 
We'll max out those vibes, Bwaan bwaaпљЮn!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of that, Trai-pi, since you've barely debuted, 
let's keep this goin'! Drop me a LANE anytime! Okay?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Next time I'll take ya to a real Awe&Some partyвШЖ

In the end, she still thought I wanted to become 
a party peep, but since she seemed to be feeling 
better, I was alright with this result.

Understanding more about partying would probably make 
it easier to keep her motivation up. вА¶вА¶And maybe aiming 
to be a party peep wouldn't be so bad.
